---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem or workflow gap this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help illustrate the request.
